description: Reorder the samples in an expression dataset and class file by class
author: Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## ReorderByClass GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ReorderByClass is a GenePattern module that Reorder the samples in an expression dataset and class file by class

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: expression.data.filename, class.filename, expression.data.file.output.name, class.file.output.name
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>ReorderByClass.jar<path.separator><libdir>broad-cg.jar<path.separator><libdir>trove.jar<path.separator><libdir>Jama-1.0.1.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.modules.reorderbyclass.ReorderByClass <expression.data.filename> <class.filename> <expression.data.file.output.name> <class.file.output.name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: expression.data.file.output.name
parameters.description: Name of expression data output file
